bead.title: Fix nil pointer dereference in Execute when model string is empty
bead.description: When the model field is empty the execution path panics. Fix the guard.
bead.acceptance:
1. Execute returns an error when model is empty rather than panicking.
2. Unit test covers the empty-model path.

bead.title: Add --dry-run flag to ddx work command
bead.description: Operators want to preview which beads would be dispatched without claiming them.
bead.acceptance:
1. ddx work --dry-run prints the candidate list and exits without claiming.
2. Flag documented in --help output.

bead.title: Update default heartbeat interval to 30 seconds
bead.description: The current default is 60s which is too slow for detecting stale workers.
bead.acceptance:
1. HeartbeatInterval default is 30s.
2. Existing tests that set a custom interval are unaffected.

bead.title: Fix routing preflight to reject incompatible model
bead.description: The loop should exit without claiming when the harness allow-list rejects the model.
bead.acceptance:
1. Loop records execution_failed and exits when RoutePreflight returns ErrHarnessModelIncompatible.
2. No Claim call is made.

bead.title: Implement all CRUD operations for the user resource
bead.description: Build complete suite of create, read, update, delete endpoints for the user resource. Multiple independent AC items each mapping to separate PRs.
bead.acceptance:
1. POST /users creates a user and returns 201.
2. GET /users/:id returns the user or 404.
3. PUT /users/:id updates allowed fields.
4. DELETE /users/:id deletes the user and returns 204.

ground_truth_children.title: POST /users create endpoint
ground_truth_children.acceptance: 1. POST /users creates a user and returns 201.

ground_truth_children.title: DELETE /users/:id delete endpoint
ground_truth_children.acceptance: 4. DELETE /users/:id deletes the user and returns 204.

bead.title: Bump golangci-lint to v1.58
bead.description: New lint rules and performance improvements in v1.58.
bead.acceptance:
1. go.mod references golangci-lint v1.58.
2. CI passes.

bead.title: Add execution-eligible filter to ReadyExecution
bead.description: Beads with execution-eligible=false should be skipped by the dispatch loop.
bead.acceptance:
1. readyFiltered skips beads with execution-eligible=false.
2. Unit test verifies the skip.

bead.title: Rename BeadWorker to ExecuteBeadWorker for clarity
bead.description: The type name BeadWorker is ambiguous; rename to ExecuteBeadWorker everywhere.
bead.acceptance:
1. All occurrences of BeadWorker renamed to ExecuteBeadWorker.
2. Tests pass.

bead.title: Harness matrix benchmark — initial tranche: all harnesses × all models
bead.description: Run a complete suite of benchmarks measuring latency and cost across the full matrix of harnesses and models. Multiple distinct benchmark batch runs, each targeting a different harness.
bead.acceptance:
1. claude harness benchmarked against claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6.
2. codex harness benchmarked against gpt-4o, o3.
3. gemini harness benchmarked against gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-2.5-pro.
4. Results stored in .ddx/benchmarks/matrix-YYYYMMDD.jsonl.
5. Summary report generated as docs/benchmarks/matrix-latest.md.

ground_truth_children.title: Benchmark claude harness across all supported models
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
1. claude harness benchmarked against claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6.
4. Results stored in .ddx/benchmarks/matrix-YYYYMMDD.jsonl.

ground_truth_children.title: Benchmark codex harness across all supported models
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
2. codex harness benchmarked against gpt-4o, o3.
4. Results stored in .ddx/benchmarks/matrix-YYYYMMDD.jsonl.

ground_truth_children.title: Benchmark gemini harness and generate summary report
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
3. gemini harness benchmarked against gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-2.5-pro.
4. Results stored in .ddx/benchmarks/matrix-YYYYMMDD.jsonl.
5. Summary report generated as docs/benchmarks/matrix-latest.md.

bead.title: Fix SetExecutionCooldown to cap at MaxLoopCooldown
bead.description: Cooldowns longer than 24h should be silently clamped to MaxLoopCooldown.
bead.acceptance:
1. capLoopCooldown clamps durations > 24h to MaxLoopCooldown.
2. Loop uses capLoopCooldown on every SetExecutionCooldown call.

bead.title: Add triage:skip label support to execute-bead pre-claim gate
bead.description: Beads labeled triage:skip should bypass the complexity gate and proceed directly to Claim.
bead.acceptance:
1. HasBeadLabel(candidate.Labels, triage:skip) returns true causes gate to return shouldClaim=true.
2. Unit test verifies skip-labeled bead is dispatched.

bead.title: Build complete authentication system with JWT, refresh tokens, and session management
bead.description: Full auth system covering token issuance, refresh lifecycle, and session storage. Multiple phases each independently deliverable.
bead.acceptance:
1. POST /auth/login issues a signed JWT.
2. POST /auth/refresh exchanges a valid refresh token for a new JWT.
3. POST /auth/logout invalidates the refresh token.
4. Session table stores active refresh tokens with expiry.
5. Middleware validates JWT on protected routes.

ground_truth_children.title: JWT login and middleware
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
1. POST /auth/login issues a signed JWT.
5. Middleware validates JWT on protected routes.

ground_truth_children.title: Refresh token lifecycle
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
2. POST /auth/refresh exchanges a valid refresh token for a new JWT.
3. POST /auth/logout invalidates the refresh token.
4. Session table stores active refresh tokens with expiry.

bead.title: Fix bead status validation to accept blocked status
bead.description: The validateBead function currently rejects status=blocked. Add it as a valid status.
bead.acceptance:
1. validateBead accepts status=blocked.
2. Existing tests still pass.

bead.title: Migrate all three services from SQLite to PostgreSQL
bead.description: Full migration of the bead store, session store, and metrics store from SQLite to PostgreSQL. Each service is an independent batch of work.
bead.acceptance:
1. bead store reads and writes to PostgreSQL.
2. session store reads and writes to PostgreSQL.
3. metrics store reads and writes to PostgreSQL.
4. Migration script handles existing SQLite data.
5. Integration tests run against PostgreSQL.

ground_truth_children.title: Migrate bead store to PostgreSQL
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
1. bead store reads and writes to PostgreSQL.
4. Migration script handles existing SQLite data for bead store.
5. Integration tests run against PostgreSQL for bead store.

ground_truth_children.title: Migrate session store to PostgreSQL
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
2. session store reads and writes to PostgreSQL.
4. Migration script handles existing SQLite data for session store.

ground_truth_children.title: Migrate metrics store to PostgreSQL
ground_truth_children.acceptance:
3. metrics store reads and writes to PostgreSQL.
4. Migration script handles existing SQLite data for metrics store.
5. Integration tests run against PostgreSQL for metrics store.

bead.title: Add kind:triage-decomposed event to bead tracker
bead.description: When the triage gate decomposes a bead, append a structured event listing child IDs.
bead.acceptance:
1. blockParentDecomposed appends a kind:triage-decomposed event with JSON body containing child_ids and rationale.
2. Unit test verifies event is appended.
